top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Slip on AI Woes, Oil Extends Drop: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks fell, putting the regional benchmark on track for a second straight weekly decline as concerns mounted that the artificial intelligence-fueled rally has run ahead of itself.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
